name: devrunway
description: Modular SDLC plugin for any tech stack. Pick your tools, get tailored coding standards, MCP wiring, and SDLC workflow — from requirements to production.

GITHUB_TOKEN.description: GitHub fine-grained Personal Access Token. Required scopes: Contents (read), Issues (read/write), Pull Requests (read/write), Metadata (read).

FIGMA_TOKEN.description: Figma Personal Access Token (from Figma → Settings → Personal Access Tokens). Used for reading design files and components.
